use_cases: Display three-tier subscription pricing (Starter, Pro, Enterprise) for SaaS applications
Toggle between monthly and yearly billing cycles with automatic price recalculation
Showcase plan features with visual checkmarks and tier differentiation
Create premium feel with animated aurora/gradient background effects
Drive conversions by highlighting the featured Pro plan with visual emphasis
ai_summary: A SaaS pricing table component featuring three subscription tiers (Starter at $19/mo, Pro at $49/mo, Enterprise at $99/mo) with monthly/yearly billing toggle. Built with dark theme and animated aurora gradient background using Framer Motion. Plans display feature lists with visual checkmarks, and the Pro tier is highlighted as featured. Includes staggered fade-up animations and modern glass-morphism styling for a premium conversion-focused design.
